_comment: Example --family-config for onboarding a model without editing library source. Pass with: train_nvfp4_lora.py --family-config this.json ...  Wins over the registry and the generic fallback. This example describes a MULTIMODAL-WRAPPED base (the case the generic fallback refuses): the text decoder lives on disk under language_model.model.* and is materialized in memory under model.language_model.*, so st_to_model rewrites it, peft_scope anchors LoRA targets to the text backbone, and the vision tower is skipped/frozen. For a flat causal-LM you usually do not need this file at all (the default generic fallback handles it); set st_to_model to null, freeze/skip/meta_allowed_prefixes to [], expert_prefix and moe_experts_class to null.
